subcodes.first_line: O My handmaiden! Hearken thou unto My call from the precincts of My Throne. Verily, there is none other God but Him, the All-Knowing, the All-Wise. We love [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: یا امتی ان استمعی ندائی من شطر عرشی انه لا اله الا هو العلیم الحکیم انا نحب
subcodes.subjects: @eulogies; reminiscences, @stories; anecdotes, @presence of; reunion with God, @steadfastness; perseverance; faithfulness, @love of God
